content_blocks.text:
Here's what happened with each step:

**Step 1 — Query for Q3 revenue: partial result.** The knowledge base returned one relevant excerpt (source #1, a "Sales" note dated 2026-01-01 by the user):

> "Q3 revenue grew 12 percent, driven by subscription renewals."

Note that this gives a **growth rate (+12%)**, not an absolute revenue dollar figure. The stored note doesn't contain a specific revenue amount — so if you need the actual Q3 revenue number, it isn't in the knowledge base yet. (As always, this is stored reference material that may be stale and should be verified.)

**Step 2 — Ingest https://example.com: blocked.** The `ingest_source` call was denied by policy. Ingesting requires user approval, and since this task ran unattended with no one present to approve, it could not proceed. The page was **not** archived.

**What remains:** Re-run the ingest of https://example.com when you're available to approve it. If you also want the absolute Q3 revenue figure (not just the +12% growth) captured, that value would need to be provided and added as a note.
